name: @nirapod-bip39/workspace
description: Workspace for the nirapod-bip39 core library, tooling, and documentation site.
author: Nirapod Contributors

scripts.build:host: cmake -S packages/core -B build/packages/core && cmake --build build/packages/core && ln -sfn build/packages/core/compile_commands.json compile_commands.json
scripts.verify: bun run codegen:check && bun run --cwd packages/tools src/checks/check_idf_component.ts && bun run build:host && bun run test:host && bun run docs:doxygen
